product_name: Hot Wheels Motor Maker Kitz - 4x4 Monster Trucks Kit

bullets: GO BIG - These pull back Monster Trucks can take on the gnarliest terrain! Build the truck from the snap-fit parts, pull back and watch them fly over the stunt ramp provided! They can even do a wheelie!
SIX TO COLLECT - Featuring some of the most iconic Hot Wheels Monster Trucks, there are six  to collect in this assortment including Mega Wrex and Bone Shaker!

EASY TO BUILD - This make your own kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult. It is also recognised as having some STEM learning benefits!
ECO FRIENDLY - With the car body made entirely from recyclable material and the packaging doubling up as a stunt ramp, this is a great eco friendly toy!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - These iconic Hot Wheels Monster Trucks provide hours of open ended play allowing their imaginations to run wild!
content.description: GO BIG! with Monster Trucks Maker Kitz! Assemble snap-fit parts made from strong recyclable plastic, add giant wheels with 4x4 power and take on the gnarliest terrain! They even pop a wheelie! Included in the assortment are fan favourites Mega Wrex & Bone Shaker, so start collecting your trucks now! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Monster Truck Body Panel Kit, 2 x Monster Wheels with Pull Back Motor, 1 x Cardboard Stunt Ramp, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
